companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q3 Increase card-led controlled spend depth
companyObjectives.statement: Turn reconciliation gains into higher card and control adoption in strategic accounts.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q3 Improve travel program intelligence and supplier steering
companyObjectives.statement: Make travel policy and supplier insight more actionable for procurement-led accounts.

objectives.title: 2026-Q3 Finance Operations Director / Group Controller outcome goal
objectives.objective: Expand controlled-spend depth by improving card adoption, budget enforcement, and audit-ready automation.

keyResults.metric: Card attach in managed spend accounts
keyResults.statement: Increase the share of strategic spend accounts using card-backed control workflows.

executingTeams.intent: Improve card program adoption and activation.

supportingTeams.intent: Improve the control value of card workflows.

objectives.title: 2026-Q3 Travel Manager / Procurement Lead outcome goal
objectives.objective: Increase travel program effectiveness through better supplier steering and leakage insight.

keyResults.statement: Increase use of preferred suppliers by surfacing clearer route and vendor recommendations.

executingTeams.intent: Improve travel and supplier steering workflows.

supportingTeams.intent: Improve supplier analytics and benchmark visibility.
